extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Maestro/Agentic Process designer with a send task selected on the Approve path. In the Properties panel on the right, the task "Update Financial Systems" is configured to execute a connector activity using the Data Fabric connector, the shared Data Fabric connection, and the "Create Entity Record (New)" activity for the "Payments Queue" object. The primary input field InvoiceData is mapped to the variable "out_InvoiceData".
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the "Update Financial Systems" task on the process diagram.
2. In the Properties panel, select "Execute connector activity" from the Action dropdown.
3. Select "Data Fabric" from the Connector field.
4. Select "Shared Data Fabric Connection" from the Data Fabric connection field.
5. Select "Create Entity Record (New)" from the Activity dropdown.
6. Select "Payments Queue" from the Object field.
7. In the "InvoiceData" field, enter or select "out_InvoiceData".
